book.loadProjectErrorHint: Check that the app is running in Tauri and the database is available.
book.stageIdeaSummary: Working title and a short promise of the story.
book.stageHeroSummary: The lead character, their drive, and the tension and opposing force that set the plot in motion.
book.stageWorldSummary: Place, time and conditions that shape the conflict.
book.stageStakesEndingSummary: The cost of failure, the direction of the ending and an expanded premise.
book.stageReaderVoiceSummary: Genre, audience, tone, perspective and scale of the book.
book.stageRulesSummary: Themes, boundaries and style that keep later generations in check.
book.stageCoverSummary: Final title, title variants and an optional draft cover.
book.hintTitle: A title candidate for the cover, export and project presentation.
book.hintWorkingTitle: A working name for the project that helps recognize the book before a final title exists.
book.hintPremise: A short promise of the story: who, what they want, what stands in their way and why it matters.
book.hintProtagonistSummary: The most important character leading the story; who they are at the start and why they carry the book.
book.hintProtagonistGoal: A concrete external drive that pushes the plot forward.
book.hintExpandedPremise: One paragraph combining the core idea, the conflict and the anticipated direction of the book.
book.hintCentralConflict: The main tension that drives the hero's decisions and the plot structure.
book.hintAntagonistForce: An antagonist, system, problem, mystery or inner block standing in the hero's way.
book.hintStakes: What the hero, their relationships or the world lose if the goal is not achieved.
book.hintSettingSketch: Place, time and basic conditions of the world that genuinely affect the conflict.
book.hintEndingDirection: A working answer to where the story should arrive emotionally or plot-wise.
book.hintGenre: The main convention that sets the reader's expectations.
book.hintSubgenre: Refining the genre promise or a mix of conventions.
book.hintTargetAudience: The reader group we tune the language, pace, level of darkness and complexity to.
book.hintTone: The dominant mood of the narration and scenes.
book.hintPointOfView: The perspective and narration mode that will drive the scenes.
book.hintTargetWordCount: An approximate book length used later to plan chapters and pacing.
book.hintThemes: The main ideas meant to recur in characters, conflict and scenes.
book.hintUnwantedThemes: Content the AI and author should avoid in further work.
book.hintAlternativeTitles: A list of variants to compare before choosing the final one.
book.hintStyleGuide: Practical rules for language, rhythm, dialogue, description, humor, darkness and stylistic bans.
book.placeholderPremise: Who, what they want, what stands in their way and why it matters
book.placeholderProtagonistSummary: Who the character leading the story is
book.placeholderProtagonistGoal: A concrete drive powering the plot
book.placeholderSetting: Place, time and world conditions affecting the conflict
book.placeholderStakes: What will be lost if the hero fails
book.placeholderEndingDirection: A working plot or emotional ending
book.placeholderExpandedPremise: A paragraph expanding the book's premise
book.placeholderUnwantedThemes: What to avoid in later prompts
book.placeholderStyleGuide: Notes on language, rhythm, bans and preferences
book.placeholderFinalTitle: The title that will go on the cover
book.placeholderAlternativeTitles: One title per line or comma-separated
book.advancedTitlesDescription: Title variants for brainstorming — they do not go into prompts.
book.coverOpenFullPreview: Open the cover in full preview
book.coverGenerateTitle: Create a cover based on data from the concept view
book.planViewComingSoon: The plan view will be available in the next phase.
book.providerNotReady: {{provider}} is not ready. Configure the text provider on the AI screen.
book.validationWordCount: The target word count must be a positive number or stay empty.
book.validationPremiseTooLong: The premise is too long; move the details into the expanded premise.
book.generateWholeRecordHint: Generate coherent content for all of this record's text fields in one AI call and save it right away.
book.aiFieldQueuedTitle: Field "{{label}}" is waiting in the AI queue.
book.aiContextAddNoTarget: First select a text field to open the prompt context.
book.aiContextAddAlready: Field "{{label}}" is already in the prompt context.
book.aiContextAddTitle: Add field "{{label}}" to the prompt context.
book.customOptionAddValueTitle: Add a custom value for the {{label}} field.
book.customOptionAddTitle: Add a custom option to the {{label}} field
book.fieldQueuedReason: Field "{{label}}" is already in the AI queue.
book.codexNotReady: Codex CLI is not ready right now.
book.planAiContextAddTitle: Add the plan field to the active prompt context.
book.relationModalThreadsAllPinned: All threads are already assigned to this chapter.
book.relationModalBeatsAllPinned: All beats are already assigned to this chapter.
book.deleteBeatDesc: You'll delete the beat and its chapter pins. Pins: {{pins}}.
book.deleteThreadDesc: You'll delete the thread and its links to chapters and scenes. Chapters: {{chapters}}. Scenes: {{scenes}}.
book.deleteChapterDesc: You'll delete the chapter and its relations. Scenes from this chapter move to the “No chapter” section. Scenes: {{scenes}}.
book.deleteSceneDesc: You'll delete the scene along with its content and plan relations.
book.planIntro: First lay out the acts and a working chapter skeleton, then map threads, beats and scenes across it.
book.addActsChaptersToUnlockPreview: Add acts and chapters to unlock the preview.
book.msgStructureAndActsSaved: Saved the plan structure and prepared the acts.
book.msgThreadFlowSaved: Saved the thread flow in the chapter.
book.msgStyleReferenceSet: Marked the scene as a style reference for the AI.
book.errSceneGenerationQueued: Scene generation for the chapters is already queued.
book.errThreadAssignmentQueued: Assigning threads to chapters is already queued.
book.msgBulkSceneGenerationQueued: Queued one bulk scene generation for the chapters.
book.msgBulkThreadAssignmentQueued: Queued one bulk thread assignment to the chapters.
book.fieldAlreadyQueued: Field "{{field}}" is already in the AI queue.
book.generateScenesForAllChaptersHint: Generate scene suggestions for all chapters.
book.styleReferenceActiveHint: Style reference scene — the AI mimics its prose (click to unmark)
book.styleReferenceSetHint: Mark as a style reference scene for the AI
book.actsAlreadyExist: Acts already exist, so the choice won't overwrite the skeleton.
book.customStructureNoActs: A custom structure doesn't create acts automatically.
book.actsWillBePrepared: After saving, the app will prepare these acts.
book.choiceAddsNoActs: This choice won't add acts automatically.
book.actsHint: Once the acts are set, create the chapter skeleton: working containers to which you'll later pin threads and beats.
book.name: Name
book.beatsIntro: The beat map organizes the structural obligations. The main contract decision still happens in the chapter cockpit.
book.generateBeatSheetHint: Generate a beat sheet assigned to the working chapters
book.allVisibleBeatsAssigned: All visible beats are assigned to chapters.
book.chapterHasNoBeats: This chapter has no beats yet.
book.beatAssignHint: A beat can be assigned to only one chapter. Changing it here moves it from its previous place.
book.threadsIntro: Map the arcs and tensions across the working chapter skeleton. This screen is a flow map, while the contract details go back to the chapter cockpit.
book.addThreadsToAssignToChapters: Add threads to assign them to chapters.
book.generateThreadFlowHint: Generate suggestions for how threads flow through all chapters.
book.changeCriteriaOrAddThread: Change the criteria or add a new plot thread.
book.plannedResolutionPlaceholder: How the thread should resolve in the finale — the AI seeds foreshadowing in scenes
book.saveThreadToPinChapters: Save the thread to pin chapters.
book.addChaptersToSeeThreadFlow: Add chapters to see the thread flow
book.mapAutoFromRelations: The map is built automatically from the relations between threads and chapters.
book.threadRelationsMapWholeStory: Thread relations map across the whole story
book.threadNoDescription: This thread has no description yet.
book.addChapterToThread: Add a chapter to the thread
book.threadPinnedToAllChapters: The thread is already pinned to all chapters.
book.threadPanelHint: The panel will show the status, chapters and flow of the selected thread.
book.workingChaptersAndCockpit: Working chapters and the contract cockpit
book.chaptersSummaryLine: {{chapters}} ch. / {{words}} words planned. Start with working containers, then complete the full contract later with threads and beats.
book.generateStructureHint: Generate a story structure proposal with AI
book.generateActsHint: Generate an act breakdown with AI
book.generateThreadsHint: Generate plot thread proposals with AI
book.createSkeletonHint: Create a working chapter skeleton by acts
book.actHasNoChapters: This act has no chapters yet.
book.noChaptersInActivePlan: No chapters in the active plan
book.addFirstChapterHint: Add the first working chapter to have a container for threads and beats.
book.checkReadinessHint: Check whether the chapter skeleton already has a contract ready for scenes
book.breakChapterIntoScenesHint: Generate 2-5 scenes that execute the chapter contract
book.noBeatsPinnedToChapter: No beats pinned to the chapter.
book.noThreadsPinnedToChapter: No threads pinned to the chapter.
book.chapterHasNoScenes: The chapter has no scenes yet. Break it into scenes or add the first one manually.
book.noFlowDescriptionInChapter: No flow description in this chapter.
book.noThreadsInChapterContract: No threads in the chapter contract.
book.chapterLooksReady: The chapter looks ready to write.
book.addBeatToChapter: Add a beat to the chapter
book.addThreadToChapterShort: Add a thread to the chapter
book.allThreadsAssignedToChapter: All threads are already assigned to this chapter.
book.allBeatsAssignedToChapter: All beats are already assigned to this chapter.
book.addToActivePromptContext: Add {{label}} to the active prompt context
book.itemNoDescription: This item has no description yet.
book.clickItemHint: Click an act, beat, thread or chapter to see its assignments and context.

fantasy.label: fantasy
fantasy.hint: Magic, world rules, a promise of wonder.

kryminal.label: crime
kryminal.hint: A puzzle, clues, investigation and revealing the truth.

obyczajowa.label: literary drama
obyczajowa.hint: Relationships, everyday life and emotional change.

thriller.label: thriller
thriller.hint: Time pressure, danger and high tension.

scienceFiction.label: science fiction
scienceFiction.hint: Technology, speculation and the consequences of ideas.

romans.label: romance
romans.hint: A romantic relationship as the main axis of tension.

cozyMystery.label: cozy mystery
cozyMystery.hint: A mystery without brutality in the foreground.

urbanFantasy.label: urban fantasy
urbanFantasy.hint: The extraordinary woven into a modern city.

spaceOpera.label: space opera
spaceOpera.hint: Grand scale, adventure and clashing systems.

slowBurnRomance.label: slow burn romance
slowBurnRomance.hint: A relationship built through prolonged tension.

adult.label: adult
adult.hint: An adult reader, greater complexity and themes.

ya.label: YA
ya.hint: Young adults, fast pace and strong identification.

middleGrade.label: middle grade
middleGrade.hint: Younger readers, adventure and a clear conflict.

dzieci.label: children
dzieci.hint: Simpler language, safer themes and a clear rhythm.

faniKryminalu.label: crime fans
faniKryminalu.hint: Readers expecting clues, twists and fair play.

faniFantasy.label: fantasy fans
faniFantasy.hint: Readers who love worldbuilding, mythology and magic's consequences.

mroczny.label: dark
mroczny.hint: A heavier mood, mystery and moral costs.

cieply.label: warm
cieply.hint: Closeness, hope and empathy toward the characters.

ironiczny.label: ironic
ironiczny.hint: Distance, wit and a subversive narrator.

liryczny.label: lyrical
liryczny.hint: Vivid language, rhythm and emotional density.

napiety.label: tense
napiety.hint: Pressure and the constant question of what comes next.

kameralny.label: intimate
kameralny.hint: Smaller scale, intimate scenes and relationships.

epicki.label: epic
epicki.hint: Grand scale, high stakes and sweep.

humorystyczny.label: humorous
humorystyczny.hint: A light rhythm, situational or dialogue-driven comedy.

pierwszaOsoba.label: first person
pierwszaOsoba.hint: Close to emotion and subjective narration.

trzeciaOsobaOgraniczona.label: third person limited
trzeciaOsobaOgraniczona.hint: Close to the POV but with more control over distance.

trzeciaOsobaWszechwiedzaca.label: third person omniscient
trzeciaOsobaWszechwiedzaca.hint: A wider scale and a free overview of the world.

czasTerazniejszy.label: present tense
czasTerazniejszy.hint: Immediacy and a stronger pulse to scenes.

tozsamosc.label: identity
tozsamosc.hint: Who the hero is when the roles fall away.

pamiec.label: memory
pamiec.hint: What remains of the truth after time and manipulation.

zdrada.label: betrayal
zdrada.hint: A break in trust and its consequences.

three_act.label: Three-act
three_act.bestFor: Universal novels when you need a simple backbone for the story.
three_act.organizes: Sets up the beginning, confrontation and resolution in clear proportions.

0.name: Beginning
0.purpose: Introduce the hero, the world, the desire and the inciting incident.

1.name: Confrontation
1.purpose: Develop the conflict, complications, trials and the midpoint turn.

2.name: Resolution
2.purpose: Bring the conflict to a finale and show the consequences of the hero's choices.

save_the_cat.label: Save the Cat
save_the_cat.bestFor: Commercial, genre-driven and strongly paced stories.
save_the_cat.organizes: Guides through the story's promise, genre play, crisis and finale.
save_the_cat.result: Adds 3 acts: Setup, Fun and Games / Bad Guys Close In, Finale.

0.name: Setup
0.purpose: Set up the world, hero, theme, catalyst and the decision to enter the story.

1.name: Fun and Games / Bad Guys Close In
1.purpose: Develop the genre promise, the midpoint, the antagonist's pressure and the deepest crisis.

2.name: Finale
2.purpose: Let the hero use the story's lessons and resolve the main conflict.

heros_journey.label: Hero's Journey
heros_journey.bestFor: A hero's transformation, fantasy, adventure or coming-of-age story.
heros_journey.organizes: Splits the story into the call, the trials and the return transformed.
heros_journey.result: Adds 3 acts: Ordinary World / Call, Trials and Transformation, Return.

0.name: Ordinary World / Call
0.purpose: Show the ordinary world, the hero's lack, the call and crossing the threshold.

1.name: Trials and Transformation
1.purpose: Lead the hero through trials, allies, crisis and inner change.

2.name: Return
2.purpose: Bring about the return, confrontation and a new balance after transformation.

mystery_outline.label: Mystery outline
mystery_outline.bestFor: Crime, investigative thrillers and plots built on the question: what really happened?
mystery_outline.organizes: Organizes the crime, the investigation, red herrings and the reveal of the truth.
mystery_outline.result: Adds 4 acts: Crime and question, Investigation, Complications and red herrings, Reveal and consequences.

0.name: Crime and question
0.purpose: Set up the mystery, the stakes, the suspects and the question driving the investigation.

1.name: Investigation
1.purpose: Gather clues, build hypotheses and widen the circle of suspicion.

2.name: Complications and red herrings
2.purpose: Raise the pressure, undermine the evidence and lead to false conclusions.

3.name: Reveal and consequences
3.purpose: Reveal the truth, confront the culprit and show the cost of the resolution.

custom.label: Custom
custom.bestFor: An experimental or bespoke structure without imposed stages.
custom.organizes: Leaves full freedom to define acts, beats and proportions.

book.laneChaptersAwaiting: Chapters awaiting assignment to an act.
